'''D-4R5''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] assigned to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison on [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

The droid was shot by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]] so that Imperial lieutenant [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]] could use it as a cover to get close to [[Mora]], a local repair shop owner who was suspected of being linked to the [[H'drachi]] resistance. He would later be used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], such as decoding the encoded messages from Grigor's secret [[Dragite crystal]] mine.

He stated that he was an adept at over one million different codes.
